userinfoService.title: Salesforce UserInfo Service
userinfoService.description: Flex Gateway service pointing to the Salesforce UserInfo host (e.g. login.salesforce.com). The path is configured separately via userinfoPath.

userinfoPath.title: UserInfo Path
userinfoPath.description: Path of the Salesforce UserInfo endpoint. Change only if your org uses a custom domain or different path.

propertiesKey.title: Properties Key
propertiesKey.description: Nested key written under principal.properties that holds the entire custom_attributes pair-set relayed from UserInfo. ABAC reads principal.properties.<propertiesKey>.<attributeName>. Mirrors how JWT Validation nests claims under principal.properties.claims.

attributeAllowList.title: Attribute Allow List
attributeAllowList.description: When non-empty, only relay custom_attributes keys that appear in this list. Empty (default) relays all keys the Salesforce admin configured. Use to restrict which attributes downstream policies can read.

attributeName.title: Flat Projection Attribute Name (Optional)
attributeName.description: Optional. When set, ALSO project this single custom_attributes key flat to principal.properties.<propertyName> for simple/legacy Cedar rules. Leave empty to use only the nested pair-set at principal.properties.<propertiesKey>.

propertyName.title: Flat Projection Property Name (Optional)
propertyName.description: Optional. The flat key name written to principal.properties.<propertyName> for the single-attribute projection. Defaults to attributeName when not set. Only used when attributeName is set.

timeoutMs.title: UserInfo Request Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the Salesforce UserInfo HTTP response before treating the call as a failure. Must be between 1000ms and 30000ms.

cacheEnabled.title: Enable Caching
cacheEnabled.description: Cache UserInfo attribute results keyed on a hash of the access token. Reduces outbound calls to Salesforce. Effective TTL is min(cacheTtlMinutes, remaining token lifetime).

cacheTtlMinutes.title: Cache TTL (minutes)
cacheTtlMinutes.description: How long (in minutes) to cache a resolved attribute pair-set. Set 0 for no time-based expiry (cache only bounded by token lifetime). Maximum 60 minutes. Only active when cacheEnabled is true.

maxCacheEntries.title: Max Cache Entries
maxCacheEntries.description: Maximum number of entries held in the cache at any time. Bounds memory usage. Mirrors the Token Introspection policy default of 1000.

cacheBackend.title: Cache Backend
cacheBackend.description: Storage backend for the cache. local: in-process memory (single-replica only). remote: shared Redis/external cache (multi-replica safe). Default: local.

onEnrichmentError.title: On Enrichment Error
onEnrichmentError.description: Behaviour when the custom_attributes cannot be determined (UserInfo timeout, non-200, unparseable body). denyClosed (default): inject an empty pair-set and continue — Cedar rules checking for a specific value will deny. failRequest: short-circuit the request with HTTP 503. allowOpen: inject a permissive pair-set (discouraged; always fully logged and metered).

statusProperty.title: Status Property Name
statusProperty.description: A second key written to principal.properties.<statusProperty> carrying ok | error | unauthenticated. Allows ABAC rules to distinguish a successful enrichment from a failed one.
